title: lessons.jsonl row
description: Schema for one row of semantic/lessons.jsonl. Vendored fields match upstream agentic-stack v0.11.2. Extension fields (why, how_to_apply, original_markdown_path) are brainstack additions, optional and backward-compatible.

id.description: Stable lesson id, format `lesson_<12hex>` (1:1 with the source candidate's id when one exists).

claim.description: The canonical lesson text — the rule itself.

conditions.description: Tag-like conditions extracted by the clustering pass. Used for retrieval relevance.

evidence_ids.description: Episodic timestamps that fed into this lesson's source cluster.

status.description: Lifecycle state. `legacy` is reserved for entries auto-migrated from pre-restructure LESSONS.md bullets.

rationale.description: Why this lesson was accepted. Required by graduate.py.

supersedes.description: Lesson id this entry replaces. Renders the old lesson with strikethrough.

why.description: [brainstack extension] The reason behind the rule — context like 'incident from 2025-01' or 'compliance requirement'. Rendered in LESSONS.md as 'Why:' under the bullet when present.

how_to_apply.description: [brainstack extension] When/where the rule kicks in — 'in tests touching the database', 'on every PR review'. Rendered in LESSONS.md as 'How to apply:' under the bullet when present.

original_markdown_path.description: [brainstack extension] If migrated from a native auto-memory dir, points to the long-form companion markdown under <brain>/memory/ that preserves the original frontmatter and prose. NOT the source path — the source dir may be deleted post-migration.

name.description: [brainstack migration extension] Frontmatter `name` from the source feedback file. Capped at 200 chars. Distinct from the candidate-internal `pattern_<terms>_<hash>` naming that promote.py uses — see CHANGELOG.

type.description: [brainstack migration extension] Frontmatter `type` from the source feedback file (typically `feedback`). Capped at 200 chars.

source_session_id.description: [brainstack migration extension] Snake-case mapping of the source frontmatter's `originSessionId` — the Claude Code session that produced this feedback. Named `source_session_id` (NOT `origin_session_id`) to avoid collision with the v0.3 episodic `origin` discriminator (`coding.tool_call`, `agentry.<agent>.<event>`). Lessons do not carry `origin`.
